common.errorBody: Check your connection and try again.

auth.title: Welcome to Madro
auth.subtitle: Understand the quality of what you eat
auth.magicLinkSent: Check your inbox — we sent you a login link.
auth.error: That didn't work. Check your details and try again.
auth.rateLimited: Too many attempts right now — wait a few minutes and try again.
auth.tagline: Understand your food — no guilt, no judgement.

design.title: Madro design system
design.subtitle: build plan §3 · tokens are the only styling source
design.footer: Temporary page — replaced when the real app shell takes over.

sections.paletteNote: Semantic colors — same utility, automatic light/dark. Hex values are read live from the CSS variables.
sections.verdictNote: Muted quality scale — never alarming, no guilt.
sections.macroNote: Protein, carbs and fat — approved in the design draft.
sections.typographyNote: Geist Sans for UI, Geist Mono with tabular-nums for all numbers.
sections.depthNote: Light: subtle layered shadows. Dark: surface lightness and hairlines instead of shadow.
sections.buttonsNote: Primary, secondary and ghost — spring on press, no scaling under reduced motion.
sections.chipsNote: Neutral chip, brand chip and VerdiktBadge in all five levels.
sections.cardsNote: Card on surface with shadow-1 · Input with visible label · pulsing Skeleton.
sections.stepperNote: Stepper with aria-live value · Radix tabs with arrow-key navigation.
sections.sheetNote: Bottom sheet with spring physics (Radix Dialog: Esc closes, focus is trapped) · toast above the tab bar. Both follow the page's active theme — use the switch at the top.
sections.appshellNote: BottomTabBar with a raised central scan button — this frame is the gallery's phone preview.

design.specimen: Understand the quality of what you eat

demo.searchHint: Searches across USDA, Frida and Open Food Facts
demo.scanToast: The scan flow arrives in Phase 1

scan.hint: Point the camera at the barcode
scan.cameraError: Camera unavailable — enter the barcode below instead
scan.lookingUpDeepBody: Not in our library yet — checking Open Food Facts and saving it for next time.
scan.missBody: We couldn't find the barcode {{barcode}}. Try searching by name instead.
scan.noResults: No results — try a different word.
scan.errorBody: We couldn't look up the barcode — check your connection.

label.title: Photograph the label
label.intro: Take a clear photo of the ingredient list and nutrition declaration — we'll fill in the product for you.
label.nothingFound: We couldn't read a label in the photo — try again with better light and the full text in frame.
label.saveError: Couldn't save the product — try again.

verdict.insufficient: Not enough data for a verdict yet

attribution.off: Data: Open Food Facts — licensed under ODbL (opendatacommons.org).
attribution.frida: Data: Fødevaredata (FCDB v6.1, 2026), National Food Institute, DTU.

diary.title: Diary
diary.emptyHint: Scan a product or add a meal with the plus button.

add.title: Add meal
add.hint: Search the whole library — brands, whole foods and your own items.

write.label: Write what you ate
write.placeholder: e.g. two slices of rye bread with cheese and a banana
write.aiNotConfigured: The AI helper isn't set up yet — use search for now.
write.rateLimited: Many attempts in a short time — try again shortly.

quality.label: not ultra-processed
